## Runtime.Session.EditingSession.toEditJournalEntry() method

Creates an edit journal entry from this session. Records the original version and any modifications made.

**Signature:**

```typescript
toEditJournalEntry(notes?: CommonModel.ICategorizedNote[]): Result<IFillingEditJournalEntry>;
```
